data.title: Standard Chartered Executes Share Buy-Back to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has issued an announcement.

Standard Chartered PLC announced the purchase of 1,538,000 of its ordinary shares as part of a share buy-back program. The shares were acquired at prices ranging from 915.0000 to 942.0000 GB pence, with a volume weighted average price of 929.6235 GB pence. This move is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and enhance shareholder value. Following the cancellation of these shares, the total number of voting rights will be adjusted to 2,379,628,501, indicating a reduction in the company’s outstanding shares and potentially increasing the value of remaining shares.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a leading international banking group, incorporated in England and Wales, with a strong presence in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East. The company provides a wide range of financial products and services, including personal and corporate banking, wealth management, and investment services, focusing on emerging markets.

YTD Price Performance: -3.76%

Average Trading Volume: 7,320

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $28.45B

Learn more about STAN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bellini Yacht to Debut ASTOR 58 at Cannes Yachting Festival 2025
data.description:
Bellini Nautica S.P.A. ( (IT:BELL) ) has provided an update.

Bellini Yacht, a subsidiary of Bellini Nautica, is set to unveil the ASTOR 58, a new luxury walkaround open yacht, at the Cannes Yachting Festival 2025. This launch aligns with the Bellini Group’s growth strategy and follows the successful introduction of the ASTOR 36 model. The ASTOR 58, designed in collaboration with Norberto Ferretti and Brunello Acampora, features spacious interiors, high performance, and innovative design, aiming to enhance the sailing experience while maintaining the brand’s heritage of craftsmanship and innovation.

More about Bellini Nautica S.P.A.

Bellini Nautica, founded in 1967, operates in the luxury boating sector, producing Bellini Yacht brand boats and trading both new and used boats. The company also restores and markets ‘Vintage Riva’ boats and provides storage and port assistance services. Bellini Nautica emphasizes aesthetic research and collaborates with international artists, offering a range of services including refitting, painting, boat transport, rental, and maintenance. The company is headquartered in Clusane d’Iseo, Italy, with production facilities in Corte Franca.

YTD Price Performance: -10.32%

Average Trading Volume: 12,889

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €17.48M

data.title: Endesa Launches Second Tranche of Share Repurchase Program
data.description:
Endesa SA ( (ES:ELE) ) has provided an announcement.

Endesa, S.A. has announced the implementation of the second tranche of its share repurchase program, with a maximum monetary amount of 500 million euros, aiming to reduce its share capital by amortizing the acquired shares. This move is part of a broader strategy to optimize capital structure, and the majority shareholder, Enel S.p.A., has committed not to participate in the program, ensuring no market disruption during the execution period.

More about Endesa SA

Endesa, S.A. operates in the energy sector, focusing primarily on electricity generation, distribution, and commercialization. The company is a significant player in the Spanish energy market and is majority-owned by Enel S.p.A., which holds 70.10% of its share capital.

data.title: YAMADA Consulting Group Revises Forecasts and Increases Dividend
data.description:
YAMADA Consulting Group Co., Ltd. ( (JP:4792) ) just unveiled an announcement.

YAMADA Consulting Group Co., Ltd. has revised its forecasts for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025, indicating an increase in net sales and profits due to strong performance in its M&A advisory and management consulting businesses, as well as successful transactions by its subsidiary, Pinnacle Inc. The company also announced an increase in the fiscal year-end dividend, reflecting its commitment to returning profits to shareholders and maintaining a stable dividend policy.

More about YAMADA Consulting Group Co., Ltd.

YAMADA Consulting Group Co., Ltd. operates in the consulting industry, providing M&A advisory services, management consulting, and real estate consulting. The company focuses on delivering strategic guidance and solutions to enhance business operations and growth.

data.title: Morgan Advanced Materials Executes Share Buyback to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Morgan Advanced Materials ( (GB:MGAM) ) has issued an announcement.

Morgan Advanced Materials PLC announced the repurchase of 28,184 of its ordinary shares at a weighted average price of 185.0163 pence per share. This transaction is part of a previously announced buyback program and reflects the company’s strategic initiative to optimize its capital structure by cancelling the repurchased shares, potentially enhancing shareholder value.

Spark’s Take on GB:MGAM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:MGAM is a Neutral.

Morgan Advanced Materials shows strong operational efficiency and an appealing valuation with a low P/E ratio and high dividend yield. However, the lack of revenue growth and bearish technical indicators are concerns. Positive corporate actions, such as share buybacks, reflect confidence in the company’s future, partially offsetting these concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:MGAM stock, click here.

More about Morgan Advanced Materials

Morgan Advanced Materials PLC operates in the advanced materials industry, focusing on the production of high-performance materials and components. The company serves various sectors, including transportation, healthcare, and industrial markets, with a strong emphasis on innovation and sustainability.

data.title: Central Asia Metals Sells Copper Bay Stake to Guardian Metals
data.description:
Central Asia Metals ( (GB:CAML) ) has provided an announcement.

Central Asia Metals has completed the sale of its 76.1% stake in Copper Bay Ltd to Guardian Metals PLC, including the acquisition of the remaining minority shares. The deal, valued at $7.5 million, is structured in deferred payments tied to copper production milestones. This transaction allows CAML to potentially realize additional value for its shareholders, as the Copper Bay project is set on a path for future development under new ownership.

More about Central Asia Metals

Central Asia Metals, an AIM-quoted UK company based in London, operates in the mining industry, focusing on the production and exploration of base metals. The company owns the Kounrad SX-EW copper project in Kazakhstan and the Sasa zinc-lead mine in North Macedonia. Additionally, it has interests in early-stage exploration opportunities in Kazakhstan and base metals development in Scotland.

data.title: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners Advances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
An announcement from Coca-Cola Europacific Partners ( (CCEP) ) is now available.

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners announced the repurchase of 56,638 ordinary shares as part of its share buyback program, which aims to repurchase up to EUR 1 billion of shares. The repurchased shares will be canceled, reflecting the company’s strategy to enhance shareholder value and optimize its capital structure.

More about Coca-Cola Europacific Partners

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners is a leading consumer goods company that produces, distributes, and sells popular beverage brands. It serves nearly 600 million consumers and supports over 4 million customers across 31 countries, leveraging its multinational scale and local expertise. The company is listed on major stock exchanges including Euronext Amsterdam, NASDAQ, London Stock Exchange, and Spanish Stock Exchanges under the symbol CCEP.

data.title: Pinnacle Investment Reduces Stake in Fisher & Paykel Healthcare
data.description:
Fisher & Paykel Healthcare Corporation Limited ( (FSPKF) ) just unveiled an update.

Fisher & Paykel Healthcare Corporation Limited has announced a significant change in the substantial holding of its ordinary shares. Pinnacle Investment Management Group Limited, along with its subsidiaries, has reduced its stake from 6.1954% to 5.1562%, reflecting a movement of more than 1% in its substantial holding. This adjustment in shareholding could influence the company’s market dynamics and stakeholder interests, as it indicates a shift in the investment strategy of a major shareholder.

data.title: ERI Holdings Reclassifies HIKARI TSUSHIN as Affiliated Company
data.description:
ERI Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (JP:6083) ) just unveiled an update.

ERI Holdings Co., Ltd. announced that HIKARI TSUSHIN, INC. has been classified as an ‘other affiliated company’ due to HTI indirectly holding over 20% of ERI’s voting rights through its subsidiaries. This reclassification follows a notification from HTI and discussions with their auditing firm. The change will not impact ERI’s financial performance.
